title: A Recipe for Stable Offline Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: 尽管单智能体离线强化学习（RL）已取得显著成就，但多智能体强化学习（MARL）在采纳这一范式时仍面临挑战，大多仍依赖于从头开始的同策略训练与自我博弈。造成这一差距的原因之一是非线性价值分解的不稳定性，导致先前的研究倾向于避免使用复杂的混合网络，转而采用单智能体设置中常用的线性价值分解（如VDN）配合价值正则化。本文分析了离线MARL设置中非线性价值分解不稳定的根源。我们的观察证实，这些方法会引发价值尺度放大和优化过程不稳定。为缓解此问题，我们提出了一种简单技术——尺度不变价值归一化（SVN），它能在不改变贝尔曼不动点的前提下稳定行动者-评论者训练。通过实证研究，我们探讨了离线MARL关键组件（如价值分解、价值学习和策略提取）之间的相互作用，并推导出一套实用方案，以充分释放其潜力。
preview_text: Despite remarkable achievements in single-agent offline reinforcement learning (RL), multi-agent RL (MARL) has struggled to adopt this paradigm, largely persisting with on-policy training and self-play from scratch. One reason for this gap comes from the instability of non-linear value decomposition, leading prior works to avoid complex mixing networks in favor of linear value decomposition (e.g., VDN) with value regularization used in single-agent setups. In this work, we analyze the source of instability in non-linear value decomposition within the offline MARL setting. Our observations confirm that they induce value-scale amplification and unstable optimization. To alleviate this, we propose a simple technique, scale-invariant value normalization (SVN), that stabilizes actor-critic training without altering the Bellman fixed point. Empirically, we examine the interaction among key components of offline MARL (e.g., value decomposition, value learning, and policy extraction) and derive a practical recipe that unlocks its full potential.
one_line_summary: 该论文提出一种稳定离线多智能体强化学习的实用方法，通过分析非线性值分解的不稳定性并引入尺度不变值归一化技术。
